feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: why are people really out there saying this isn't an evil dead movie? it's argua…
entry.content: why are people really out there saying this isn't an evil dead movie? it's arguably the most evil dead movie since the original/ed2. there's deadites, the book, dark humor, gruesome torture, shocking moments, it shat all over rise. but some folks are upset at the lack of ash or an ash-type i guess? sure you can argue it doesn't do some things in the traditional sense but then again the trilogy didn't do the same thing every time so that's a moot argument, people really just don't want things to

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Do criminals in the US really go free if they tip the police of a "bigger" crimi…
entry.content: Do criminals in the US really go free if they tip the police of a "bigger" criminal? Will they really overlook rape and assault charges just because they are an important informant? In my opinion that is higly immoral, if you are a criminal scum you should be kept behind bars as you are a danger to society. I dont really think of it as a zero sum game.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Can’t decide between these two cars. I want a v8 panther body for sure but there…
entry.content: Can’t decide between these two cars. I want a v8 panther body for sure but there’s a 2004 Grand Marquis with 100k miles and a 2007 Lincoln Town Car with 170k. GM has a better body but rougher interior and I personally like it less. Town Car is beat up on the outside but interior is immaculate and it has a sunroof (I like that). Am I retarded to pass up the GM for those reasons? Picrel, it’s the Lincoln.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Music
entry.content: Peppino di Capri died yesterday on Capri island. 87 years old. Seven decades of career. Dude literally helped introduce rock n roll and twist to Italy in the 50s-60s. Won Sanremo twice. His version of Lets Twist Again was #1 in Italy for 32 consecutive weeks. When they brought his coffin to the church the whole island of Capri literally stopped. Bars in the famous Piazzetta removed their tables. Crowds outside following a big screen. Mayor declared day of mourning. Even Bach's Air on the G Strin

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Undeveloped Tech
entry.content: I like reading on wikipedia about random consumer tech that never got developed and what could have been. Do you have any you thought were cool? SED TVs (and FED tvs by sony, slightly different) were a bridge between CRTs and flat screens. Im gonna horribly simplify how it works so dont crucify me, but from what i understand the electron gun shoots vertically instead of having a deep back and runs along the surface of the screen, so you pretty much had a crt in the form factor of a plasma tv. Th

entry.title: /int/ International: I WILL pronounce "marry," "Mary," and "merry" the same I WILL pronounce "utter" …
entry.content: I WILL pronounce "marry," "Mary," and "merry" the same I WILL pronounce "utter" and "udder" the same I WILL pronounce "writer" and "rider" with the same consonants but different vowels I WILL pronounce "winter" and "winner" the same when I'm speaking quickly I WILL pronounce "do" and "due" the same I WILL rhyme "hurry" and "furry" I WILL rhyme "mirror" and "nearer" I WILL rhyme "oral" and "moral" I WON'T rhyme "roster" and "foster" I WILL pronounce "pasta" with the vowel in "father" I WILL prono

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: I'm tired of nu-/tv/ and the endless tomfoolery this board engages in. There was…
entry.content: I'm tired of nu-/tv/ and the endless tomfoolery this board engages in. There was an old /tv/. Back before generals. Back before cunny posting. Back before Marvel and superheroes. A time where this board actually discussed films. Post the most culturally significant movie you've watched recently. 12 Angry Men is the antithesis of the shitty blockbuster films churned out these days. You don't need seizure-inducing actions sequences, 15 main characters, or hundreds of millions of dollars worth of G

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: [Fantastic News] US government approves Sony Bank
entry.content: >Sony received approval from the US regulator to create its own bank with a single objective: to launch its own digital currency pegged to the dollar so you can pay for games, anime, and subscriptions within its ecosystem. >It's targeting 2027, and the goal is to save on the fees it currently pays to credit cards This is so exciting! Now those pesky banks won’t get any cut from our friend Sony and they will be able to deliver more and more quality products!

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I beat this old FFVII, it was fun but there's too much missable content and stuf…
entry.content: I beat this old FFVII, it was fun but there's too much missable content and stuff that isn't explained. One guy, to get his ultimate weapon, you need to talk to a random NPC 3 times. Entire backstories are in obscure places. It's bad game design.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: So what was ever the point of a five thread limit if you are allowed to use endl…
entry.content: So what was ever the point of a five thread limit if you are allowed to use endless IPs to flood the catalogue? With one guy endlessly repeatedly necrobumping threads it's easy to get stuck at thread limit without having any real discussion or anything going on that this site was made for. entry.title: /b/ Random: I think this would be a wonderful opportunity to pause for a moment and give tha…
entry.content: I think this would be a wonderful opportunity to pause for a moment and give thanks for the great contributions of the Black community to our society. Their peaceful and generous nature makes them ideal neighbors, lending testimony to their exceptional family values and parenting skills unrivaled by any other culture. Their commitment to academic excellence enriches our schools and serves as an example to all who hope to achieve prominence as a people. Real estate values are fueled by the mix of

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Can I be real for a second?
entry.content: This board is fucking atrocious right now. You're all acting like a bunch of whiny, entitled little babies. Nolan made for you an entire movie about ancient greece. He made it for YOU, and he is going to wake up tomorrow morning and see that instead of enjoying it, this community of "fans" picked out the 3 or 4 things that weren't perfect and are using that to fucking riot. Guess what? The movie was never going to be perfect. It was never going to live up to your hype. It was never going to be e

entry.title: /b/ Random: 1039 faces labeled her. censored dump from his Photos.
entry.content: Remote session archive. This loser has an entire Photos People stack for his celebrity crush — 1039 faces under one name. Partner faces indexed next to it. Fetish tabs open while he builds a control fantasy around her. Bars on the pic, not on the truth. He knows. You would too if you saw his library counts. Permanent.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Is supporting indie devs moral? All that money goes to a single person that make…
entry.content: Is supporting indie devs moral? All that money goes to a single person that makes a product that's not equal to AAA. Whereas supporting companies means your money is going towards supporting MANY families and high quality products.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Whats the solution to the collector problem? You can't afford the original copie…
entry.content: Whats the solution to the collector problem? You can't afford the original copies anymore so how are people growing up supposed to experience these games? Emulation is not the answer. Native will always be better. >Just hardwaremod everything bro and install all these 10 mods! No, too much effort for everyone.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Monster Hunter
entry.content: This game is everything I imagined as a kid Pokemon would become. Super high production value, probably the nicest anime character models that aren't gacha , big open zones where I can ride my monster... I've never even played a MonHun game before but FUCK this is what I always wanted My only issue is the monsters are kinda ugly, and you don't get any evos like you do with Pokemon or Digimon. But there's a few I like

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Ray Gunn ('26)
entry.content: Am I the only one really looking forward to this? Looks like Bird's finally going to town with an art deco, retro futurist world, that Incredibles and Tomorrowland only hinted at. Hope this gets some theatrical release.
